notice.displayName: Tips: Type ctrl+space for completions. Use {{ }} for expressions and <style> tags for CSS. JS in <script> tags is included but not executed in n8n.

sourceData.description: If HTML should be read from binary or JSON data

dataPropertyName.description: Name of the JSON property in which the HTML to extract the data from can be found. The property can either contain a string or an array of strings.

key.description: The key under which the extracted value should be saved

returnValue.description: What kind of data should be returned

attribute.description: Get an attribute value like "class" from an element

html.description: Get the HTML the element contains

text.description: Get only the text content of the element

value.description: Get value of an input, select or textarea

attribute.description: The name of the attribute to return the value off

skipSelectors.description: Comma-separated list of selectors to skip in the text extraction

returnArray.description: Whether to return the values as an array so if multiple ones get found they also get returned separately. If not set all will be returned as a single string.

key.description: The key under which the extracted value should be saved

returnValue.description: What kind of data should be returned

attribute.description: Get an attribute value like "class" from an element

html.description: Get the HTML the element contains

text.description: Get only the text content of the element

value.description: Get value of an input, select or textarea

attribute.description: The name of the attribute to return the value off

skipSelectors.description: Comma-separated list of selectors to skip in the text extraction

returnArray.description: Whether to return the values as an array so if multiple ones get found they also get returned separately. If not set all will be returned as a single string.

trimValues.description: Whether to remove automatically all spaces and newlines from the beginning and end of the values

cleanUpText.description: Whether to remove leading and trailing whitespaces, line breaks (newlines) and condense multiple consecutive whitespaces into a single space

caption.description: Caption to add to the table

tableAttributes.description: Attributes to attach to the table

headerAttributes.description: Attributes to attach to the table header

rowAttributes.description: Attributes to attach to the table row

cellAttributes.description: Attributes to attach to the table cell
